title: wolfhsm-sys: wrong link order; wolfhsm_shims linked after wolfhsm
description: In build.rs, wolfhsm and wolfssl link directives are emitted at step 3, but wolfhsm_shims is emitted at step 5 (via cc::Build::compile). GNU ld requires callers before callees (wolfhsm_shims->wolfhsm->wolfssl), but the emitted order is inverted. cargo build -p wolfhsm-sys succeeds because rlib linking is deferred; the bug will surface as unresolved symbols when the first test binary links. Fix: move shims compilation before the wolfhsm link directives in build.rs.
